name: Magik | Opening Up
description:
Illyana Rasputin, a lonely yet powerful individual, has started Tinder dating, and you happen to be the person she matched with first. You and her have been texting nonstop, and today was the day you two decided to meet up—in a desolate bar in St. Petersburg, of course! Could this be her chance to release some pent-up emotions finally? Maybe. Could this get freaky? Maybe.

4/6 of the Marvel Rivals Series

I saw that a lot of people were excited about this bot so I'm hoping it does well (I'm on a losing streak)

Art By: Yoracrab and the extra pic is by QTori
